summary: Completed first full end-to-end test of Shaadi Saga India MVP. All 12 backend pytest cases pass including Claude Sonnet 4.5 AI Matchmaker integration. Frontend home, vendors listing (41 cards, budget slider, verified toggle), vendor detail, matchmaker (successfully returned 3 Boho-Chic recommendations with warm reasoning from Claude), and real weddings pages all render and function correctly.

issues: 'Matchmaker says' reasoning text appears in very light gold on cream background — low contrast and hard to read. Should use darker maroon/ink color for body text.

action_items: Increase contrast of matchmaker 'reasoning' text (currently light gold on cream is hard to read).
Optional: expose home category cards with data-testid^=category-card- (currently only anchors) for more robust E2E tests.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: `logger` is referenced inside matchmaker's except block before `logging.basicConfig(...)` is executed at module bottom — at import time this works because logger is created later, but the matchmaker exception handler uses logger before it is defined at module scope order. In practice Python resolves at call time so fine, but cleaner to move logger setup above the router functions.
Vendor response intentionally strips `_id` via projection {'_id': 0} — good.
Matchmaker LLM JSON parsing is defensive (strips ```json fences) but does not validate `ids` are strings; a malformed LLM reply could crash inside json.loads and fall through to except — acceptable.
seed_data is re-seeded via POST /api/seed which is a public endpoint — should be protected or removed in production.
No rate limiting on /api/matchmaker (LLM cost exposure).
test_credentials: N/A - no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Not needed - backend auto-seeds on startup when DB empty. 41 vendors + 4 real weddings + 19 categories already present.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers categories (19), vendors list+filters (category/budget/rating/verified/search), vendor detail, real-weddings (4), and AI Matchmaker with Claude Sonnet 4.5 (takes ~6-15s per call, tested with 3 scenarios). Frontend uses data-testid: vendor-card-{id}, realwedding-full-{id}, matchmaker-theme-{slug}, matchmaker-submit, nav-*. Matchmaker city is a free text input (not chip). Categories on home are anchor tags (no category-card testid).
